key_findings: ShipStation v2 has 2 warehouses, 100 locations each
→ Phase 7 ramp deferred (requires operator to populate v2 IDs and clear pause flag)
v2 collapses per-(warehouse, sku) writes into a SINGLE SKU-total row (case 1)
decrement on Loc-A propagates to single SKU-total row (case 2)
modify new_available=15 returns 400 — asymmetric per Patch D2 (case 3)
DELETE on inventory_locations that have ever held inventory rejected with HTTP 400 even with 3-retry exp backoff (case 4 — confirmed Reviewer A hypothesis)
v2Fetch JSON-parse bug discovered (200/empty-body → 'Unexpected end of JSON input')
3 TEST-PROBE locations now permanently stuck in v2: se-4106160, se-4106161, se-4106162 in warehouse se-214575
